com.mentor.chs.plugin.query

Interface IXCustomExpression

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXCustomFilterExpression, IXCustomResultExpression, IXSBOMContextFilterExpression, IXSBOMContextResultExpression

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXCustomExpression
extends IXPlugin
    Parent class for all custom queries. This class shouldn't be implemented directly. Please implement one of its children, for example, IXCustomFilterExpression or IXCustomResultExpression. This allows Capital to associate the plug-in with the correct query type. If there is a custom query that is compatible with more than one query type, just implement all the interfaces concerned.

    NOT TO BE USED DIRECTLY.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXCustomExpression.Context

      IXCustomExpression.Context[] getApplicableContexts()
      Get Array of IXCustomExpression.Context for which this custom expression will be applicable.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getApplicableContexts

        IXCustomExpression.Context[] getApplicableContexts()
        Get Array of IXCustomExpression.Context for which this custom expression will be applicable. If the expression is applicable to all objects return an empty list.
        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.DiagramFor Logic, Harness and Integrator Diagram
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDesignFor Logic Designs only
        IXCustomExpression.Context.HarnessDesignFor Harness Designs only
        IXCustomExpression.Context.PlaneDesignFor Integrator Designs only

        Below enums for Generic Logic Objects are special enums to represent a group of similar connectivity objects.

        This simplifies the writing of applicable contexts. For examples, if we want to have context of all pinlists of a logical diagram, we can have a enum as LogicPinList which will include all logic bjects such as connector/splice/device etc.

        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.PinFor Any Logic Connectivity Pin Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.PinListFor Any Logic Connectivity PinList Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ConductorFor Any Logic Connectivity Conductor Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.MulticoreFor Any Logic Connectivity Multicore Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ConnectorFor Any Logic/Harness Connectivity Connector Object

        Below enums for Generic Harness Object Types are special enums to represent a group of similar connectivity objects. This simplifies the writing of applicable contexts. For examples, if we want to have context of all MultiLocationComponents of a harness diagram, we can have a enum as MultiLocationComponent which will include all harness MLCs such as NodeMLC, CavityMLC and WireMLC.

        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.NodeFor Any Harness Connectivity Node Object i.e Reference Node or Structure Node.
        IXCustomExpression.Context.NodeComponentFor Any Harness Connectivity Node Components i.e Clip, Grommet and OtherComponent.
        IXCustomExpression.Context.MultiLocationComponentFor Any Harness Connectivity MultiLocation Components i.e NodeMLCComponent,

        WireMLCComponent and CavityMLCComponent.

        IXCustomExpression.Context.NodeInsulationFor Any Harness Connectivity NodeInsulation Object i.e BreakoutTape or SpotTape.
        Logic Object Types
        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.InterconnectFor Any Logic Connectivity Interconnect Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.DeviceConnectorFor Any Logic Connectivity Device Connector
        IXCustomExpression.Context.DeviceFor Any Logic Connectivity Device Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ShieldConductorFor Any Logic Connectivity Shield Conductor
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SpliceFor Any Logic Connectivity Splice
        IXCustomExpression.Context.NetConductorFor Any Logic Connectivity NetConductor
        IXCustomExpression.Context.WireFor Any Logic Connectivity WireConductor
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BackshellFor Any Logic Connectivity BackShell
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BackshellTerminationFor Any Logic Connectivity BackShell Termination
        IXCustomExpression.Context.GroundDeviceFor Any Logic Connectivity Ground Device
        IXCustomExpression.Context.AdditionalComponentFor Any Logic Connectivity Additional Component
        IXCustomExpression.Context.TerminalBarFor Any Logic Connectivity Terminal Bar
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ShieldBodyFor Any Logic Connectivity ShieldBody
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ConnectorPinFor Any Logic Connectivity Connector Pin
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SplicePinFor Any Logic Connectivity Splice Pin
        IXCustomExpression.Context.DevicePinFor Any Logic Connectivity Device Pin
        IXCustomExpression.Context.AssemblyFor Any Logic Connectivity Assembly
        IXCustomExpression.Context.CavityDetailFor Any Logic Connectivity CavityDetail
        Harness Object Types
        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BundleFor Any Harness Connectivity Bundles
        IXCustomExpression.Context.ClipFor Any Harness Connectivity Clips
        IXCustomExpression.Context.GrommetFor Any Harness Connectivity Grommets
        IXCustomExpression.Context.InsulationRunFor Any Harness Connectivity InsulationRuns
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BundleInsulationFor Any Harness Connectivity Bundle Insulations
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BreakoutTapeFor Any Harness Connectivity Breakout Tape
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SpotTapeFor Any Harness Connectivity Spot Tape
        IXCustomExpression.Context.OtherComponentFor Any Harness Connectivity OtherComponent
        IXCustomExpression.Context.FixtureFor Any Harness Connectivity Fixture
        IXCustomExpression.Context.NodeDimensionFor Any Harness Diagram Node Dimension
        IXCustomExpression.Context.AxialDimensionFor Any Harness Diagram Axial Dimension
        Integrator Object Types
        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.BundleRegionFor Any Integrator Connectivity Bundle Region
        IXCustomExpression.Context.CavityFor Any Integrator Connectivity Cavity
        IXCustomExpression.Context.HoleFor Any Integrator Connectivity Hole
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SlotFor Any Integrator Connectivity Slot
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SlotDeviceFor Any Integrator Connectivity SlotDevice
        IXCustomExpression.Context.SlotDevicePinFor Any Integrator Connectivity SlotDevice Pin
        IXCustomExpression.Context.TopoSignalFor Any Integrator Connectivity Topology Signal
        IXCustomExpression.Context.InlineConnectorFor Any Integrator Connectivity InlineConnector
        IXCustomExpression.Context.VirtualConnectorFor Any Integrator Connectivity VirtualConnector

        Below enums are special enums to represent schematic objects which have thier corresponding connectivity objects also. This separates out the custom expressions which will work on schem objects rather than their corresponding connectivity object.

        For example, a custom expression which is applicable for Home objects only will need to have the context of LogicDiagramPin, LogicDiagramConductor, LogicDiagramPinList or LogicDiagramConductor only.

        Context EnumDescription
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramPinFor Any Logic Diagram Pin Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramPinListFor Any Logic Diagram PinList Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramConductorFor Any Logic Diagram Conductor Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramMultiCoreFor Any Logic Diagram MultiCore Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramHighwayFor Logic Diagram Highway Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.HarnessDiagramFixtureFor Any Harness Diagram Fixture Object
        IXCustomExpression.Context.HarnessDiagramBundleFor Any Harness Diagram Bundle Object

        Example: 

         IXCustomExpression.Context[] getApplicableContexts() {
        // Applicable for any logic diagram pin
        retrun new IXCustomExpression.Context[] {IXCustomExpression.Context.LogicDiagramPin};
 }
        Returns:
        an Array of IXCustomExpression.Context enums
